creator: jack.pappas@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #3)
> Hi Jack,
> 
> I prepared a new patch to update fsharp to 3.1.1.25, could you test it and
> provice some comments?  Thanks!
> 
> Li-Wen

Hi Li-Wen, I tested your patch and it works just fine. Your patch uses a newer revision than mine, so the maintainers should commit your patch instead.
